signals.raw: **Series context:** Celtics favored heavily vs. 76ers (84% win prob Game 1/2); Rockets 66% vs. Lakers; Spurs 81% vs. Trail Blazers; Raptors in Game 2 at Cavaliers (series: Cavs lead).[1][2][3] No series wins confirmed yet; playoffs tipped off April 18.[1]

**Cooper Flagg:** No mentions in results; no confirmed news on involvement (e.g., draft, debut).[1-8]
